generated_oml:
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of building systems for immediate action"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted equipment failures and maintenance needs"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated outcomes for design and operational scenarios"
]

instance DataAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from aggregated data for strategic decisions"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized operational parameters for resource efficiency"
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems for operational insights",
    provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance and failure prevention",
    provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building performance under various scenarios",
    provides SimulationInsight
]

instance DataAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comprehensive data analysis for informed decision-making",
    provides DataAnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of building operations for energy efficiency and cost savings",
    provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity and data ingestion",
    enables MonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, DataAnalysisService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin representation and management",
    enables MonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, OptimizationService
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) for extracting structured representations and generating deployable DT artifacts",
    enables SimulationService, OptimizationService
]

instance BIMModelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "BIM model as a component for data processing"
]

instance BuildingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from physical building assets"
]

instance BuildingSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom BuildingSensor,
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data synchronized via Eclipse Hono and Ditto with tenant ID and device endpoint metadata for context-aware integration"
]

instance BIMDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    producedFrom BIMModelComponent,
    base:desc "BIM model data transmitted for MDE processing"
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured real-time sensor data processed for DT integration",
    fromData BuildingSensorDataTransmitted,
    inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance MDEStructuredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured BIM data processed via Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)",
    fromData BIMDataTransmitted,
    inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) enriched with sensors, actuators, and controllers for unified semantic foundation",
    inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals transmitted from the digital twin to physical systems via bidirectional data exchange, allowing Facility Managers to monitor and adjust building operations in real time."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system maintains real-time synchronization between physical assets and the virtual representation through continuous data exchange, enabling real-time monitoring and analysis. This synchronization is critical for providing immediate insights and supporting dynamic decision-making processes in the AECO domain."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs a model-driven framework that integrates Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion and Ditto for digital twin management, utilizing Unreal Engine for high-fidelity visualization. The architecture is modular with defined extension points, and the DT Framework acts as a central hub coordinating all components, ensuring seamless orchestration and system-wide coordination."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics, and runtime configuration management enabling adjustments without full redeployment."
]
